meaning: adj.撕的,劈的,折的adv.极妙地,非凡地
examples: Thousands of volts surged through his car after he careered into a lamp post, ripping out live wires.
What a ripping little house this is!
John said, "How ripping," but decided to have tea first.
Officials said the trailer disconnected from the rig and slammed into the van, ripping it apart.
The real scandal is not that the bank might be ripping off the student.
